'''dhasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidromeiosis|hidromeiosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidromeiosis|hidromeiosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsesheth|dhæsesheth]] || [[word:dhæseshej|dhæseshej]] || [[word:dhæseshesh|dhæseshesh]] || [[word:dhæseshe|dhæseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasososhoth|dhasososhoth]] || [[word:dhasososhoj|dhasososhoj]] || [[word:dhasososhosh|dhasososhosh]] || [[word:dhasososho|dhasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasoshoth|dhasoshoth]] || [[word:dhasoshoj|dhasoshoj]] || [[word:dhasoshosh|dhasoshosh]] || [[word:dhasosho|dhasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasofshofth|dhasofshofth]] || [[word:dhasofshofj|dhasofshofj]] || [[word:dhasofshofsh|dhasofshofsh]] || [[word:dhasofshof|dhasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasoshotho|dhasoshotho]] || [[word:dhasoshojo|dhasoshojo]] || [[word:dhasoshosho|dhasoshosho]] || [[word:dhasoshoko|dhasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasoshoth|dhasoshoth]] || [[word:dhasoshoj|dhasoshoj]] || [[word:dhasoshosh|dhasoshosh]] || [[word:dhasosho|dhasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasoshothol|dhasoshothol]] || [[word:dhasoshojol|dhasoshojol]] || [[word:dhasoshoshol|dhasoshoshol]] || [[word:dhasoshokol|dhasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasoshoothotho|dhasoshoothotho]] || [[word:dhasoshoojojo|dhasoshoojojo]] || [[word:dhasoshooshosho|dhasoshooshosho]] || [[word:dhasoshooko|dhasoshooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasoshothon|dhasoshothon]] || [[word:dhasoshojon|dhasoshojon]] || [[word:dhasoshoshon|dhasoshoshon]] || [[word:dhasoshokon|dhasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasoshothooro|dhasoshothooro]] || [[word:dhasoshojooro|dhasoshojooro]] || [[word:dhasoshoshooro|dhasoshoshooro]] || [[word:dhasoshokooro|dhasoshokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|c579b50}}
